title: NFSU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Clerk and MTS Posts
description: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the 02 vacancies for Clerk and MTS Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass or any degree can grab this chance and apply for the NFSU Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. I...
